= NETWORKING =

== tcp/ip ==

==== ip address aliasing ====
CentOS::
  :: `/etc/sysconfig/network-scripts`
  :: `cp ifcfg-ethX icfg-ethX:N`
  <br>
  :: necessary fields in alias interface are:
  {{{
  DEVICE="ethX:N"
  BOOTPROTO=static
  ONBOOT=yes
  IPADDR=...
  NETMASK=...
  GATEWAY=...
  }}}
  :: `/etc/init.d/network restart`
